description: Description Baby Boys Girls Pom Pom Hat With Pom Pom Booties Large Pom Pom On Hat & Booties Keeps Head And Ears warm Soft Knitted, Good for the cold Weather Size: NB-12 Months Material: 100% Acrylic Colour . This baby bobble hat can be worn indoors or outdoors and is an excellent gift for babies. The baby pink and baby blue hats are suitable for gender reveal and all the colours make the hat ideal for twin gifts. You can mix and match your colours to top off your baby outfits. The baby hat is hand washable and retains its shape well. From newborns toddlers, this is a go-to baby pom pom hat for all seasons.
